activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor verification via group structure in invoice text
Juridical party company name exact matching
General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization and additional EU member country in invoice
EU country and member country equivalent origin verification

consignor.certificate_value:
Berg Prop Prod. AB
Tärnvägen 15
SE-475 40, HÖNÖ
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch)
Bldg. 4W-A413, DAFZA
Dubai Airport Freezone
Po Box 54517, Dubai
Dubai
THE UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' from certificate is explicitly found in invoice text context as 'Berg Propulsion' group presence and branding including VAT and company identifiers. The invoice is issued by 'Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch)' located in Dubai. The consignor country Sweden matches the expected country after normalization rule (4.1.4). Rule 4.1.0 applies as the consignor appears within invoice documents as part of the group branding and related company info.

consignee.certificate_value:
HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L
MSM - Workshop
Building Number- 56
Street Number -- 3019, Zone - 91
Birkat Al Awamer
City- Doha,
PIC: Vinu Vijayan Pillai - Workshop
Qatar
consignee.invoice_value:
MILAHÁ SHIP MANAGEMENT W.L.L.
Um Al Saneem, Street #523
Zone 56, Bldg. #149
P.O. Box:153
Doha
QATAR
consignee.motivation: The consignee name in the certificate 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' does not match the invoice consignee which is 'MILAHÁ SHIP MANAGEMENT W.L.L.'. The invoice primary consignee/buyer is different and no exact or normalized match is found for the certificate's consignee. Therefore, status is MISMATCH according to consigneee verification priority 4.2.0.2.

goods_description.invoice_value: See invoice lines referring to order number S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 and matching packaging details for 4 cases
goods_description.motivation: The certificate provides a general goods description referencing orders S6597MU501 and S6739TR508. The invoice has matching order numbers and detailed item lines that align with the described goods quantity and types. The general goods description is accepted with invoice reference as per rule 4.3.5.

quantity.invoice_value: Partial deliveries shown with different quantities and weights on invoice
quantity.motivation: The certificate indicates quantity as '4 Cases'. However, the invoice packing list shows partial deliveries with different quantities and some delivered quantities being zero or less than four cases clear. Quantity does not clearly match between the documents with no exact numeric value or total weight matching exactly as required. Hence, quantity is MISMATCH.

origin.certificate_value: SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT
origin.invoice_value: Multiple origins identified on invoice lines explicit: Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria
origin.motivation: All multiple origin countries (Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria) listed in the certificate are explicitly found as 'Country of origin' in individual invoice line items, and EU normalization covers EU countries. Hence origin is verified with MATCH status.

manual_review_triggers: Quantity partial deliveries and mismatch in numeric values
overall_assessment.decision_summary: The consignor and origin match between certificate and invoice with expected normalization. However, consignee name differs significantly and quantity as '4 Cases' does not match the invoice's partial delivery quantities, leading to NOT_IDENTICAL.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Consignornamnet i certifikatet matchar fakturans utställare, och ursprungsländerna kan verifieras korrekt med fakturan. Däremot skiljer sig mottagarnamnet mellan certifikat och faktura, och kvantiteten "4 Cases" stämmer inte överens med fakturans delvis levererade mängder. Detta kräver manuell granskning.
